title: nonea picta
intro: Nonea picta, also known as nonea or nonea plant, is a perennial plant in the mint family that belongs to the genus nonea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of nonea picta include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Nonea picta can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
